svg.title: Starry Night
svg.desc: Reading Patch background "night". Approximate swatch. Live CSS background: radial-gradient(circle at 22% 26%, #FFFFFF 1.4px, transparent 1.6px), radial-gradient(circle at 70% 18%, #FFFFFF 1.2px, transparent 1.4px), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 60%, #FFFFFF 1.4px, transparent 1.6px), radial-gradient(circle at 34% 70%, #FFFFFF 1.1px, transparent 1.3px), linear-gradient(#2E2A55, #453F79)
